overview: Energize offers personalized hormone replacement therapy, medical weight loss, and aesthetic services. Led by Nurse Practitioner Jennifer McElfresh, the clinic takes an individualized, functional medicine approach to treatment.
highlights: Bioidentical hormone replacement therapy with ongoing monitoring
Medical weight loss program with semaglutide
IV vitamin therapy and aesthetic procedures
targetAudience: Men and women seeking personalized hormone replacement therapy, weight loss support, erectile dysfunction treatment, or aesthetic services.
